# AI-related: usr/share/mios/mios.toml, tools/generate-pod-quadlets.py, mios-searxng.container
# /usr/share/containers/systemd/mios-search.pod
# SearXNG privacy-respecting search proxy.
# Members (each member .container declares Pod=mios-search.pod):
#   mios-searxng
[Unit]
Description='MiOS' Search proxy pod
After=network-online.target
Wants=network-online.target

[Pod]
PodName=mios-search
Network=mios.network
PublishPort=127.0.0.1:8899:8080

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target default.target
